reviews.comment: I could not have been more pleased with my moving experience! Ethan and Matteo were simply the most helpful and thoughtful movers I’ve ever worked with. They were quick, responsive and professional. We moved out of a 2 bed, 1 bath apartment second floor walk up and they were extremely efficient. We had quite a bit of items to load and they were able to strategically fit everything into a 20ft truck. So happy we chose them and they are truly the best value out of any movers I looked at!
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaa1pPVEF3EAE

reviews.comment: The movers are really kind and efficient. They will take the stress out of moving for you by calming your anxiety and are great problem solvers! Definitely recommend for a fast and efficient process!

reviews.comment: I have used Comfort Moving Chicago multiple times and I am always so thankful that I hire them for my moves. They make the process as streamlined and easy as possible. They are flexible, understanding, and careful when handling my things. I have now recommended them to countless friends and they have had the same experience when using them.

reviews.comment: I hired these guys to pick up an elliptical for me. Aaron and Mateo did a great job!

reviews.comment: Amazing team. These guys are fast, efficient, friendly, and very accommodating. Was the easiest move I've ever done and I would recommend them to anyone. They were very communicative about any issues or minor things that came up during the move, even making me aware of a bit of water that got on one of my boxes as soon as they noticed so I could take action if it was needed. Can't thank them enough. And for the price I don't think any other company in Chicago has them beat.
reviews.name: accounts/116507434882864969255/locations/10010227020373101361/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwLVBEdlVREAE

reviews.comment:
Comfort Moving was great! The guys were super nice, helpful, and efficient.

We were moving into a new apartment on a 4th floor walkup and they managed it like champs! They got all our items moved and rebuilt in under two hours.

Would 1000% recommend to anyone in the area looking for efficient and affordable movers!

reviews.comment: Great experience! Mateo and his team moved heavy furniture carefully and quickly at an amazing rate. They even finished with 10 minutes to spare! We’ll definitely consider for any future moves and continue to recommend them to friends in the city. Thanks!!!
